noPlans: No plans available at the moment.

headings.chooseForWebsite: Choose a Plan for Your Website
headings.chooseToStart: Choose a Plan to Get Started

subheadings.subscribeToActivate: Subscribe to a plan to create and activate your website.
subheadings.trialOrSubscribe: Start with a free trial or subscribe to a plan to create and manage your websites.
subheadings.expiredHelp: Your subscription has expired and all your websites are disabled. Subscribe to a plan for each site to restore access.
subheadings.trialPitch: Start a 7-day free trial to create up to 5 websites. No credit card required.

scheduledChange.label: Scheduled plan change:
scheduledChange.willSwitchOn: Your subscription will switch to <1>{{plan}}</1> on <1>{{date}}</1>. Your current plan stays active until then. To cancel this change, please contact support.
scheduledChange.willSwitchAtPeriodEnd: Your subscription will switch to <1>{{plan}}</1> at the end of your current billing period. Your current plan stays active until then. To cancel this change, please contact support.

trial.title: 7-Day Free Trial
trial.started: Your 7-day free trial has started! Enjoy full access to all features.
trial.startFailed: Failed to start trial. Please try again.

scheduledHelpText: Takes effect at the end of your current billing period. Your current plan keeps running until then.

scheduleConfirm.title: Schedule {{action}}?
scheduleConfirm.message: Schedule a {{action}} to {{plan}}? Your current plan keeps running until the end of your billing period, then {{plan}} starts automatically. You won't be charged twice.

enterprise.title: Enterprise
enterprise.defaultMessage: Need a custom solution for your business? Get in touch with our team for a tailored enterprise plan.

errors.notAvailableForCycle: This plan is not available for the selected billing cycle.
errors.paymentNotConfigured: Payment is not configured. Please contact the administrator.
errors.createSubscriptionFailed: Failed to create subscription. Please try again.
errors.verifyFailed: Payment verification failed. If you were charged, please contact support.
errors.processFailed: Failed to process payment. Please try again.

overlay.verifyingBody: Please wait while we confirm your payment...
overlay.creatingSiteBody: Creating your website and activating your plan...
overlay.successDefault: Your plan has been activated. You can now start building your store.
overlay.successActivated: Your plan has been activated successfully. You can now start building your store!
overlay.successActivatedShort: Your plan has been activated successfully!
overlay.successPaymentBackup: Your payment was successful and your plan is active! Your website will be created when you return to the dashboard.
overlay.errorDefault: Payment verification failed. Please contact support if you were charged.
